ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-14-2005 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-20-2005 Continued To Dec-07-05 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Oct-21-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing (Remove Cloud On Title and Cancel Deed) this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Joyce Long.
Ronald Schivo, Esq. for Plaintiff: Charles Pisani, present, was sworn and examined.
Exhibit 1---Declaration of Charles Pisani-------------------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Theresa Auquilina.
Counsel stipulated for the return of Exhibit in open court and to prepare Proposed Judgment.

Oct. 21, 2005
Proposed Judgment rec'd in court, granted and signed by Comm. Kaplan.
See scanned for details of Judgment.

Off Calendar Apr-21-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff's Motion to Vacate Sanctions for failure to appear at Orders to Show Cause is scheduled this day. There being no appearance or an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. All Sanctions issued to Plaintiff's counsel Ronald D. Schivo are ordered vacated. Moving party to submit a proposed order within five days. Proceedings not reported. (212)
